name: X-Golf Katy
address: 3329 W Grand Pkwy N Suite 100, Katy, TX 77449
about: X-Golf Katy offers indoor golf simulation experience with 8 state-of-the-art simulators. The venue combines golf technology with a full-service bar and food menu, making it suitable for both golf practice and social gatherings. It features various membership options, leagues, tournaments, and professional lessons, catering to golfers of all skill levels. The facility provides a modern environment for play, training, and entertainment with amenities like custom club fittings and private event capabilities.
why_golfers_like_it: State-of-the-art simulator technology with unparalleled accuracy and realism
Flexible pricing model accommodating both casual players and regular members
Full bar and food service available for a complete social golf experience
Professional coaching and leagues for skill development and competition

food_and_drink.notes: Draft beer and specialty cocktails available

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: No, rental clubs are available at the venue.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food and drinks?
faq.answer: No, the venue has a full bar and food menu available on site.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: It takes approximately one hour for an individual to play 18 holes. For multiple players, it's recommended to book an additional hour per person.

faq.question: Is X-Golf Katy kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, children of all ages are welcome.
